description: This file provides a set of API functions for interacting with a notes backend, including listing, creating, updating, deleting notes, and listing tags. It abstracts HTTP requests and exports functions for use in other parts of a React application.

methods.name: getBaseUrl()
methods.description: Returns the base URL for API requests, using environment variables or a default localhost URL.

methods.name: http(path, { method = 'GET', query, body } = {})
methods.description: Performs an HTTP request to the given path with optional method, query parameters, and request body, handling errors and JSON responses.

methods.name: listNotes({ q, tag, pinned } = {})
methods.description: Fetches a list of notes with optional filters such as search query, tag, and pinned status.

methods.name: createNote({ title, content, tags, pinned })
methods.description: Creates a new note with the specified title, content, tags, and pinned status.

methods.name: updateNote(id, patch)
methods.description: Updates an existing note identified by id with provided partial fields.

methods.name: deleteNote(id)
methods.description: Deletes a note specified by id.

methods.name: listTags()
methods.description: Retrieves a list of distinct tags.

ctags.name: createNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function createNote({ title, content, tags, pinned }) {$/

ctags.name: listNotes
ctags.pattern: /^export async function listNotes({ q, tag, pinned } = {}) {$/
